solvency.evidence: Latest FCF margin is 10.0%, strong free cash flow generation supports solvency (Earnings call).

dilution.evidence: Diluted share count moved only ~3.6% across the last three years of statements (10-K).

revenue_growth.evidence: Latest revenue $3.4B exceeds trough of $2.9B, indicating recovery trajectory (Investor deck).

roic.evidence: No direct ROIC series in raw data; FCF margin trajectory suggests improving capital efficiency (10-K).

valuation.evidence: Current price is 74% below ATH, providing significant margin of safety (Earnings call).

catalyst_stack.description: Pricing reset underway across the installed base with multi-year contract renewals
Plant consolidation to drive margin expansion toward 15% FCF target

invalidation_triggers.trigger: Gross margin deterioration below 25% for two consecutive quarters
invalidation_triggers.evidence: Plant consolidation execution risk cited in 10-K risk factors

decision_memo.better_than_peer: Higher FCF margin at 10% vs. peer median of 7%, with stronger pricing power from qualification moats (Industry note).
decision_memo.safer_than_peer: Lower net leverage at 1.2x vs. peer median of 2.5x, with no near-term maturities (10-K).
decision_memo.what_makes_wrong: Plant consolidation fails and margin improvement stalls, causing the stock to re-rate downward (10-K).

issues_and_fixes.issue: Plant overcapacity resulting in sub-optimal fixed cost absorption
issues_and_fixes.fix: Active plant consolidation program with two closures announced in Q4 earnings call

stretch_case_assumptions.discount_path: Full margin recovery with pricing reset and consolidation benefits (Investor deck).

analysis_inputs.moat_assessment: Qualification cycles create sticky customer relationships with 3-5 year switching costs; installed base provides recurring aftermarket revenue stream (Industry note).
analysis_inputs.thesis_summary: ACME is a quality industrial franchise trading at a significant discount due to temporary margin compression from plant overcapacity. The bear case centers on consolidation execution risk, but management has tied incentives to margin targets and has a credible track record. The worst case is a return to trough margins with limited downside from current levels, while the base case reflects pricing normalization driving FCF margin back to 10%+ (Earnings call, 10-K).
catalysts: Pricing reset across installed base (Earnings call)
Plant consolidation driving margin expansion (Investor deck)
key_risks: Execution risk around plant consolidation timeline (10-K)
Cyclical demand softness in core end markets (Industry note)

base_case_assumptions.discount_path: Current margin profile with pricing normalization and modest volume recovery (Earnings call).

probability_inputs.base_rate: Anchored to historical precedent of similar quality franchise turnarounds re-rating within 2-3 years (Sector precedent).
probability_inputs.likert_adjustments: Neutral; management credibility offsets execution risk uncertainty (Proxy).

exception_candidate.reason: Standard turnaround candidate; no exceptional circumstances identified (Earnings call).

q1_operational.justification: Dominant risk is operational plant consolidation, which is manageable and within management control (10-K).
q1_operational.evidence: Quarterly gross margin is the main live checkpoint for operational progress (Model note).

q2_regulatory.justification: No material regulatory exposure identified in risk factor analysis or research notes (10-K).
q2_regulatory.evidence: No regulatory or political risks surfaced in Gemini research sweep (Industry note).

q3_precedent.justification: Comparable turnarounds in the industrial components sector have rerated after similar self-help programs (Sector precedent).
q3_precedent.evidence: Comparable turnarounds rerated after similar self-help programs (Sector precedent).

q4_nonbinary.justification: Outcome is non-binary: even partial margin improvement drives meaningful upside from current depressed levels (Investor deck).
q4_nonbinary.evidence: Floor price analysis shows limited downside at worst-case assumptions (Model note).

q5_macro.justification: Company-specific catalysts dominate over macro sensitivity; demand improving in core end markets (Investor deck).
q5_macro.evidence: Demand is improving in core end markets despite mixed macro signals (Investor deck).
